content: ICM curiosity mechanisms can be re-engineered to actively sample low-complexity exploratory steps that intentionally work within an agent's working memory capacity limit, rather than incentivizing arbitrary novelty that pushes reasoning beyond accessible bounds. This reframes intrinsic reward from 'seek maximum novelty' to 'seek novel information that fits in working memory' to enable more reliable multi-step reasoning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
